in_scope_pages.name: Dashboard
in_scope_pages.why_it_matters: Primary entry page for this feature.

out_of_scope_notes: Admin pages are unchanged in this revision.

critical_user_flows.name: User completes the main task
critical_user_flows.expected_result: Success state is visible and persisted.

required_ui_states.notes: Each state must be deliberately reachable in test mode.

non_regression_guards.rule: No horizontal overflow at 375, 768, and 1200 widths.

must_match: Primary CTA visible above the fold

evidence.notes: Store screenshots as evidence, not as full-site visual diff baselines.

exit_criteria: FE self-check exists and references the current contract revision
BE self-check exists and references the current contract revision
Evidence screenshots exist and are current
handoff_notes: When context is lost, read this file before running QA or visual review.
